phrases.intent_en: Ask where the station kiosk is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o quiosque da estação?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee FEE-kah ah BAN-kah dah es-tah-SOW
phrases.cultural_note: Station kiosks in Portugal typically sell snacks, drinks, and basic travel supplies.

likely_response.local: No átrio principal, ao lado da bilheteira.
likely_response.pronunciation: NOO AHTR-yoo preen-see-PAHL, OW LAH-doo DUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: In the main hall, next to the ticket office.

responses.english: In the main hall, next to the ticket office.
responses.phonetic: NOO AHTR-yoo preen-see-PAHL, OW LAH-doo DUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
responses.local: No átrio principal, ao lado da bilheteira.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a plataforma 1.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh OOM.

responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh OOM.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a plataforma 1.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the station kiosk is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o quiosque da estação?
phrases.pronunciation: OHN-dee FEE-kah oh kee-OS-kee dah es-tah-SOWN
phrases.cultural_note: The station kiosk at Sintra Railway Station sells snacks, newspapers, and small travel items. It is located inside the station building, but exact placement may vary, so ask at the counter if needed.

likely_response.local: Fica no interior da estação, perto da bilheteira.
likely_response.pronunciation: FEE-kuh NOO een-tih-REEOHR DUH shtuh-SOWN, PEHR-too DUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: It's inside the station, near the ticket office.

responses.english: It's inside the station, near the ticket office.
responses.phonetic: FEE-kuh NOO een-tih-REEOHR DUH shtuh-SOWN, PEHR-too DUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
responses.local: Fica no interior da estação, perto da bilheteira.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the bus ticket vendor is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a bilheteira de autocarro?
phrases.cultural_note: Bus vendors are commonly located outside station premises in Portuguese towns.

likely_response.local: A bilheteira de autocarro fica no exterior, perto da saída principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DIH ow-too-KAH-roo FEE-kuh NOO ehsh-tih-REEOHR, PEHR-too DUH SUHEE-duh preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: The bus ticket vendor is outside, near the main exit.

responses.english: The bus ticket vendor is outside, near the main exit.
responses.phonetic: AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DIH ow-too-KAH-roo FEE-kuh NOO ehsh-tih-REEOHR, PEHR-too DUH SUHEE-duh preen-see-PAHL.
responses.local: A bilheteira de autocarro fica no exterior, perto da saída principal.

phrases.text_local: Recomendas um restaurante típico perto da estação central?
phrases.pronunciation: reh-koo-MAYNG-duhsh OONNG rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih TEE-pee-koo PEHR-too DUH shtuh-SOWN sayngt-RAHL?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao Agente CP ou ao Kioskista por sugestões locais.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW uh-ZHAYNG-tih seh-PEH OHW OW keeoosh-KEESH-tuh POOR soo-zhihsh-TOHNYSH loo-KEYESH.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the CP agent or the kiosk clerk for local suggestions.

responses.english: Ask the CP agent or the kiosk clerk for local suggestions.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW uh-ZHAYNG-tih seh-PEH OHW OW keeoosh-KEESH-tuh POOR soo-zhihsh-TOHNYSH loo-KEYESH.
responses.local: Pergunte ao Agente CP ou ao Kioskista por sugestões locais.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the CP ticket office is
phrases.text_local: Onde é o balcão de bilhetes da CP?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih EH AW bahl-KOWN DIH bee-LYEH-tihsh DUH seh-PEH?
phrases.cultural_note: CP counters handle cash payments and complex route inquiries for regional trains.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o balcão de bilhetes da CP.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW bahl-KOWN DIH bee-LYEH-tihsh DUH seh-PEH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the CP ticket office.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the CP ticket office.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW bahl-KOWN DIH bee-LYEH-tihsh DUH seh-PEH.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o balcão de bilhetes da CP.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the station kiosk is
phrases.cultural_note: Kiosks provide convenient access to quick snacks and travel essentials.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o quiosque.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW KEEOHSH-kih.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the kiosk.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the kiosk.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW KEEOHSH-kih.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o quiosque.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the bus ticket vendor is
phrases.text_local: Onde posso comprar bilhetes de autocarro no exterior?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo koomp-RAHR bee-LYEH-tihsh DIH ow-too-KAH-roo NOO ehsh-tih-REEOHR?
phrases.cultural_note: The bus ticket vendor is located outside the main exit of Sintra Railway Station in the bus square. This is where regional and city buses depart, and you can buy tickets directly from the vendor.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, siga as placas para a zona de autocarros.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH ZOH-nuh DIH ow-too-KAH-roosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, follow the signs to the bus area.

responses.english: Good morning, follow the signs to the bus area.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH ZOH-nuh DIH ow-too-KAH-roosh.
responses.local: Bom dia, siga as placas para a zona de autocarros.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a plataforma número um?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh NOON-mih-roo OONNG?
phrases.cultural_note: Platform 1 usually serves direct Lisbon commuter lines from Sintra.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, siga os azulejos azuis.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh OOSH uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh uh-ZOOEESH.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, follow the blue tiles.

responses.english: Good morning, follow the blue tiles.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh OOSH uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh uh-ZOOEESH.
responses.local: Bom dia, siga os azulejos azuis.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso comprar bilhetes de autocarro?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo koomp-RAHR bee-LYEH-tihsh DIH ow-too-KAH-roo?

likely_response.local: No exterior da estação há vendedores de bilhetes para o autocarro.
likely_response.pronunciation: NOO ehsh-tih-REEOHR DUH shtuh-SOWN AH vayng-dih-DOH-rihsh DIH bee-LYEH-tihsh PUH-ruh AW ow-too-KAH-roo.
likely_response.translation_en: Outside the station there are bus ticket vendors.

responses.english: Outside the station there are bus ticket vendors.
responses.phonetic: NOO ehsh-tih-REEOHR DUH shtuh-SOWN AH vayng-dih-DOH-rihsh DIH bee-LYEH-tihsh PUH-ruh AW ow-too-KAH-roo.
responses.local: No exterior da estação há vendedores de bilhetes para o autocarro.
